description: Extract a horizontal brightness profile across the Eagle Nebula H-alpha emission image (656nmos.fits) in AstroImageJ. Read the target Y-coordinate from ~/AstroImages/line_profile_task/profile_instructions.txt and generate an intensity profile across the entire width of the image at that coordinate. Export the profile data to ~/AstroImages/measurements/eagle_ha_profile.csv. Determine the peak intensity, the X-coordinate of the peak, the mean background (approximate mean of the lowest 25% of the profile), the total profile length in pixels, and the Full Width at Half Maximum (FWHM) of the brightest emission feature. Save a summary report to ~/AstroImages/measurements/profile_summary.txt using the following labels: PEAK_INTENSITY, PEAK_POSITION_X, MEAN_BACKGROUND, PROFILE_LENGTH, and FWHM_PIXELS.

metadata.data_description: Eagle Nebula (M16) Pillars of Creation, F656N H-alpha narrowband
